creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
New upstream version.

Fix: Changes:
    * Bump revision
    * Line-wrap at 80 chars where possible
    * Remember to fix the shebang line in shuffle.crm

After applying, portlint says:
$ portlint /usr/ports/mail/crm114
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a WITHOUT_NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
How-To-Repeat: 	NA
